Repeat steps 1 to 4 to export any additional reports you want to keep. On a Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro To export your reports: Select Reports , then choose a report in the side menu. Optionally, select any filters to refine the report, then select Run Report . Optionally, sort the information by selecting the column headers at the top of the report. At the bottom of the screen, select how you want to save your report. Print : Get a hard copy of the report. Export : Save the report to an Excel or PDF file (web version only). Repeat steps 1 to 4 to export any additional reports you want to keep. Export Your Customer List (optional) Save your customer list to keep their information handy when you start your next business or open a new account. On a Phone To export your customer list: Select More → Reports → Customers . Select Run Report Select the Action button to save your report: Print : Print your report if your device is connected to a printer. Export PDF or Export Excel : Save the report to a PDF or Excel file. On a Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro To export your customer list: Select Reports → Customers . Select Run Report . Optionally, sort the information by selecting the column headers at the top of the report. At the bottom of the screen, select how you want to save your report. Print : Get a hard copy of the report. Export : Save the report to an Excel or PDF file (web version only).
ground_truth: To cancel your Vagaro subscription on a computer or tablet, go to Settings → Manage Subscription, scroll down to Cancel Subscription, then select Cancel My Vagaro Subscription. Provide the reasons for cancellation, share any feedback, read and agree to the cancellation policy, then select Cancel Vagaro Account and confirm by selecting Cancel Subscription.

question: Where do I set up my employees' salaries in Vagaro?
context:
[Article: Set Up Your Employees' Salaries | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/24718201308827-Set-Up-Your-Employees-Salaries]
Setting up your employees' salaries is performed in the Payroll Configuration screen. A salary is a net amount agreed upon between you and an employee when the employee agrees to work for you. The amount is paid in increments depending on your Payroll Frequency when you set up your payroll. Note Employees who you have entered a salary for cannot be paid for additional roles at your business. If you want to pay an employee for performing more than one role, you must give them Hourly Pay for each role. Vagaro will consider only the Salary amount if you enter your employees' pay in both tabs. Prerequisites: This feature requires Vagaro Payroll and is available only to businesses in the US on the web, tablet, Pay Desk, and PayPro. To set up your employees' salaries: Select Reports → Payroll Configuration . Scroll down to the bottom of the screen. Select the Salary tab. For each employee, enter their Salary Per Year . Select Save .
ground_truth: You set up your employees' salaries in the Payroll Configuration screen by selecting Reports → Payroll Configuration, then scrolling down to the Salary tab and entering their Salary Per Year for each employee.

question: What steps are involved in creating a ScriptSure account for e-Prescribe setup?
context:
[Article: Activate E-Prescribe with ScriptSure | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/41115832243483-Activate-E-Prescribe-with-ScriptSure]
To create a ScriptSure account, you'll need to enter some of your information:

Note Creating a ScriptSure account only sets up e-Prescribe for your business. You will not be able to access the ScriptSure software with this information.

From Eligibility , enter your personal NPI, practice phone number, and ZIP code, complete the reCAPTCHA, and then select Next . Enter your name, time zone, and contact information, then select Next . Confirm your email, then select Next . Enter all the identification information posted for your prescriptions, then select Next . Personal NPI State License DEA Detox (NADEAN) State Controlled Enter your Account Details , Address , and Contact of your practice, then select Next . View the terms of use, code of conduct, and privacy policy, and then select I Agree to All Terms .

Important If you already have an ID.me account, simply log in to verify your identity. Providers who sign in can skip to Step Seven: Add Locations and Invite Other Providers.

To create an ID.me account:

From Create an ID.me account, enter your email, create a strong password, and then select Create Your Account . If you already have an ID.me account, you can sign in instead. Confirm your email address. Follow the on‐screen prompts if you have any issues finding or confirming your email. Secure your ID.me account with multi‐factor or two‐factor authentication (MFA/2FA). Multi‐factor authentication adds a layer of security to your account by associating something that you have with your account. For future ID.me logins (and for e‐prescribing from within e-Prescribe), you will authenticate with the MFA/2FA method and/or device you set up in this step. Be sure to use a device you plan to have on your person when e‐prescribing. Note Vagaro recommends choosing Push Notification . Push Notifications appear as a banner on your device upon signing in, which you tap to authenticate yourself. To set this up, you will be required to download the free ID.me Authenticator app from the App Store or Google Play . If you’re unable to use the ID.me Authenticator app, choose passkey MFA, the safest MFA method available. You may also choose from the other methods listed. After setting up your MFA/2FA method, the Your Account is Now Secure screen will appear. Generate a recovery code in case you lose access to your MFA/2FA device for the account. Copy or download your recovery code, and then select Continue .

After creating your ID.me account and setting up MFA/2FA, the Verify Your Identity screen will appear, where you're prompted to upload evidence of your identity. You will also be asked to enter your SSN. Information entered into ID. This information is encrypted while at rest and in transit, and completing the verification process will not hurt your credit score.

If asked to enter a phone number, attempt to enter a phone number for a device that is in your possession and may be associated with you in financial records. This device does not have to be the same device utilized for MFA/2FA.

To upload an identity document:

From the Verify Your Identity screen, choose a verification method, such as a driver's license. Acknowledge the terms, then select Continue . If you're on a computer, enter your phone number, then select Continue . A link will be sent to your phone via text so you can take photos of your document. After selecting the link on your phone, select Yes to confirm your email address, then select Start document upload . Take a photo of your document and upload it, then select Continue . After submitting your images, go back to your computer, if applicable. Enter your social security number, then select Continue . Verify your home address, then select Continue . Confirm that all your information is displayed correctly, then select Yes .

After you've uploaded your identity documents and confirmed all your information. You will be prompted to take a live selfie as one last security measure.

To take a video selfie:

From your phone, select Take video selfie . If you're on a computer, you'll have the option to take a selfie on your phone or computer. We recommend choosing Take video selfie to send a link to your phone so that you can take a selfie from your phone. Follow the prompts to take the selfie. See helpful tips below: Take the selfie "straight on" and don't use an angle Use portrait orientation Make sure your whole face is visible Turn off the flash on your camera Make sure there is no glare Make sure you're in a well-lit room. Select Continue when you've successfully taken your selfie.
ground_truth: To create a ScriptSure account, you need to enter your personal NPI, practice phone number, ZIP code, complete reCAPTCHA, provide your name, time zone, contact info, confirm your email, enter prescription identification info, and then input your practice's account details, address, and contact info, followed by accepting the terms of use, code of conduct, and privacy policy.

question: How can I rebook an appointment for a customer in Vagaro?
context:
[Article: Rebook an Appointment | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/221194188-Rebook-an-Appointment]
Rebooking appointments for satisfied customers is as easy as booking the original appointment. To rebook an appointment, you can either select a previously checked-out appointment on the calendar or select rebook in the What do you want to do next? popup when checking out a customer. For customers looking to rebook an appointment with a business, see this article .

Any appointments rebooked following the steps below will be shown in the employee Rebooking report as a Rebooked appointment.

Prerequisites: This feature is available for all Vagaro businesses .
ground_truth: You can rebook an appointment by selecting a previously checked-out appointment on the calendar or choosing rebook in the 'What do you want to do next?' popup when checking out a customer.

question: How do I sign up for a class using the Vagaro app?
context:
[Article: Sign Up for a Class - for Customers of a Vagaro Business | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000195614-Sign-Up-for-a-Class-for-Customers-of-a-Vagaro-Business]
You can book classes with Vagaro businesses on Vagaro.com or in the Vagaro app . Sign in to your Vagaro customer account to search for a business, view available classes, and complete your registration. On the Vagaro App To sign up for a class: Go to the business's listing page, then select Classes . All the available classes for the week will appear. Optionally, adjust the schedule: Under This Week , select the week range you want to view. In Any Class , enter the class you want to book. Use the Any Instructor list to select a specific instructor. Use the Live Stream and In-House Classes list to select how you want to attend. Select Sign Up for the class you want to book. Configure your class schedule, then select Next . Number of Attendees : Select whether you are signing up only yourself or additional attendees. Number of Sessions : Select how many class sessions you want to sign up for. Where would you like to take this class : If available, select whether you want to attend in person or by live stream. Sign up every : Select how often you want to attend this class. Use the week(s) box to switch between weekly and monthly frequency. Start Date : Select when you want to start attending your class. If applicable, complete the optional steps, then select Checkout : If you're booking for someone else, use the Who are you booking for list to select that person. If the business offers add-ons, select the add-ons you want to include. Review your shopping cart, then continue to checkout. Complete any remaining steps to finish your booking, then select Book , Request , or Buy Now : If you're booking a live-streamed class, confirm the current Location so that the class appears correctly on your calendar. If the business requires a card on file or a deposit, enter your payment information or use a card on file. Review and agree to the business's cancellation or refund policies. On a Computer To sign up for a class: Go to the business's listing page, then go to Classes . All the available classes for the week will appear. Optionally, adjust the schedule: Under This Week , select the week range you want to view. Use the Any Class list to select the class you want to book. Use the Any Instructor list to select a specific instructor. Use the Live Stream and In-House Classes list to select how you want to attend. Select Sign Up for the class you want to book. Configure your class schedule, then select Next . Number of Attendees : Select whether you are signing up only yourself or additional attendees. Number of Sessions : Select how many class sessions you want to sign up for. Where would you like to take this class : If available, select whether you want to attend in person or by live stream. Sign up every : Select how often you want to attend this class. Use the week(s) box to switch between weekly and monthly frequency. Start Date : Select when you want to start attending your class. If applicable, complete these optional steps, then select Checkout : If you're booking for someone else, use the Who are you booking for list to select that person. If the business offers add-ons, select the add-ons you want to include. Review your shopping cart, then continue to checkout. Complete any remaining steps to finish your booking, then select Book , Request , or Buy Now : If you're booking a live-streamed class, confirm the current Location so that the class appears correctly on your calendar. If the business requires a card on file or a deposit, enter your payment information or use a card on file. Review and agree to the business's cancellation or refund policies.
ground_truth: To sign up for a class in the Vagaro app, go to the business's listing page, select Classes, choose the desired class, adjust the schedule if needed, select Sign Up, configure your schedule and attendees, then proceed to checkout and complete your booking.

question: Can a location delete synced vendors or discounts?
context:
[Article: Multi-Location: What Syncs with a Flagship | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/19644019376027-Multi-Location-What-Syncs-with-a-Flagship]
A location can edit synced Vendors; however, it can't delete them.

What's Locked vs Unlocked? Field Name Locked vs. Unlocked Vendor Name Locked Email Locked Address Line 1 Locked Address Line 2 Locked Secondary Contact: Phone Locked Secondary Contact: Email Locked Secondary Contact: Fax Locked

A location can activate, deactivate, and/or edit synced Discounts; however, they can't be deleted.

What's Locked vs Unlocked? Field Name Locked vs. Unlocked Discount Name Locked Description Locked Start Date & Time Locked Discount Has an Expiration Date Locked Create Promotion Code for Online Shopping Cart Locked Limit Total Number of Uses Locked Limit to One Use Per Person Locked Minimum Purchase Amount Locked Access Level Required to Offer Discount Unlocked: This setting can be toggled on or off and changed without being affected by the next sync cycle. Discount will be redeemable by Locked Discount will be applied to Locked Select Discount Type Locked Service, Classes, Add-Ons, and Product Locked, except for Offered by: You can edit and change the employees who offer the discount without it being affected by the next sync cycle.

What's Locked vs Unlocked? Field Name Locked vs. Unlocked Taxes Never Syncs Include Tax in Online Pricing Locked Fees Locked: However, locations can create new Fees without being affected by the next sync cycle. Other Payment Methods Locked: However, locations can create new Fees without being affected by the next sync cycle. Reward points per review Locked Require starting balance for cash drawer Locked Deduct a visit from packages and memberships for no shows Locked Package & Memberships Sales Go Directly to Employees Locked Allow checkout of future appointments Locked Show Product Cost at Checkout Locked Enable receipt Signature on screen Locked Flag usually high checkout amounts Locked Receipt Footer Text Locked

Credit Card Details: Locked Billing Address Lines 1 and 2: Locked

Locations with Access Levels synced to a Flagship can't edit or make changes to the permissions. The location can only activate and deactivate the Access Level and assign and remove employees.

What's Locked vs Unlocked? Field Name Locked vs. Unlocked Automatically log out after Never Syncs Access Level Toggle Unlocked: Locations can toggle on and off Access Levels without being affected by the next sync cycle. Edit Unlocked: Locations can edit Access Levels without being affected by the next sync cycle. Delete Locked Safe IP Addresses Unlocked: However, you cannot edit or delete IP addresses synced over from the Flagship.

A location can change the commission rates for synced payroll settings; however, it can't change the commission Tiers and hourly rate Roles.

What's Locked vs Unlocked? Field Name Locked vs. Unlocked Payroll Frequency Locked Payroll Closing Day Locked Payroll Ending Day Locked Include Tips Locked Deduct Service/Class/Add-on Cost Locked Deduct Product Cost Locked Deduct Discounts Locked Subtract Membership Discounts from Commission Locked Only Pay Hourly Rate or Commission Locked Tiered Commission by Revenue for Services, Classes, and Products Unlocked, except for Tiers: Locations can make changes to an employee's commission without it being affected by the next payroll cycle. However, the location can't change the synced Tier dollar amounts. Commission by Service, Class, and Product Unlocked, except for Tiers: Locations can make changes to an employee's commission without it being affected by the next payroll cycle. However, the location can't change the synced Tier dollar amounts. Hourly Pay Unlocked, except for role names: Locations can make changes to an employee's hourly rates and Employee Card IDs without it being affected by the next payroll cycle. However, the location can't change the synced role names.

Locations can't make changes to or edit the synced gift card images. However, they can add new gift card images.

You can transfer over form and SOAP note templates created by the flagship. With this setting turned on all form/SOAP note templates from the flagship will transfer over to locations attached to that flagship. The synced locations will not be able to:

Delete a form template Edit a forms name

What's Locked vs Unlocked? Field Name Locked vs. Editable Form is Mandatory for all Clients Locked Form is Mandatory when Booking Unlocked Always Require Form Unlocked Form is Mandatory When Purchasing Membership Unlocked Notify When Form is Submitted Unlocked Form Has an Expiration Date Locked Require Vagaro login to fill out form Locked
ground_truth: No, a location can edit synced vendors and discounts but cannot delete them.

question: How does the system decide which visit to deduct first when marking multiple appointments as no-shows?
context:
[Article: Automatically Use Package or Membership Visits for No-Shows | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/360019205473-Automatically-Use-Package-or-Membership-Visits-for-No-Shows]
In Taxes & Checkout , you can configure your settings to always deduct a customer's membership or package when you mark their class session or appointment as a no-show. Keep the following in mind when you enable this setting: The system will always deduct a package visit first if there is also a redeemable membership visit. A membership visit will only be deducted if it provides a 100% discount on the service or class. The system will only deduct one visit at a time if you simultaneously mark multiple appointments or class sessions as a no-show. The package closest to its expiration date will be redeemed first. If the package doesn't expire, it will deduct a visit from the package with the lowest visit balance. Prerequisites: This feature is available for all Vagaro businesses . To change your settings: Go to Taxes & Checkout : Phone : Select More → Settings → Taxes & Checkout . Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro : Select Settings → Taxes & Checkout . Toggle on Deduct a visit from packages and memberships for no shows . Select Save . Mark the customer's class session or appointment as a no-show.
ground_truth: The system deducts a package visit first if there is a redeemable membership visit; otherwise, it deducts from the package closest to expiration or with the lowest visit balance if it doesn't expire.

question: How can I get my previous year's tax document if it hasn't appeared yet?
context:
[Article: Download Your Form 1099-MISC | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/19361100303643-Download-Your-Form-1099-MISC]
If you need to update your Form 1099-MISC, go to your employee profile to make the change.

On a Phone To download your 1099-MISC form for the current tax year: Select More → Settings → Employee Profiles . Select Employees to view all profiles, then select the employee's profile from the list. From their profile, next to your business's name, select Action → Rent Collection . Under Renters , go to 1099 , then for the tax year you want to edit, select Action → Edit 1099 . If you don't see the previous year's Form 1099-MISC, it hasn't been generated yet. Update your information, then select Save → Save .

On a Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro To download your 1099-MISC form for the current tax year: Select Settings → Employee Profiles . Go to Settings → Employees → Employee Profiles . Next to the employee's profile, select Action → Rent Collection . Note If multi-location is configured, select the Locations link next to their profile, then select Action → Rent Collection for one of the locations. Under Renters , go to 1099 , then for the tax year you want to edit, select Action → Edit 1099 . If you don't see the previous year's Form 1099-MISC, it hasn't been generated yet. Update your information, then select Save → Save .
ground_truth: If the form isn't visible, it means it hasn't been created yet; you need to update your details and save to generate it.

question: How does Vagaro indicate its HIPAA compliance on its website?
context:
[Article: HIPAA Compliance | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/360034898234-HIPAA-Compliance]
In 1996, the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act , also known as HIPAA, was enacted to allow the flow of a client's health information needed to provide and promote high-quality health care while protecting their health, well-being, and privacy. Because the healthcare industry is so diverse, HIPAA is designed to cover the different ways to keep patient information confidential when they seek care and healing.

Our HIPAA Seal of Compliance appears at the bottom of our Sales and Support web pages. If your business collects and stores patient information, you can turn on HIPAA compliance in Vagaro when sending messages to your clients via text, push notifications, and emails.

Learn more about HIPAA from the US Department of Health and Human Services.

HIPAA rules consist of national standards to protect patient medical records and other personal health information. It also:

Gives patients more control over their health information. Sets boundaries on the use and release of health records. Establishes appropriate measures that health care professionals and others must achieve to protect the privacy of medical information. Keeps violators accountable by imposing civil and criminal penalties for violating patient privacy rights.

For patients, it means being able to make informed decisions when seeking care based on how personal health information is used. It specifically:

Allows patients to find out how their information is used. Generally restricts the release of information to the minimum needed for the purpose of the disclosure. Generally gives customers the right to examine and get a copy of their health records and request corrections. Permits individuals to control certain uses and disclosures of their health information.

The following entities are considered covered entities and must follow HIPAA:

Health Plans , which include health insurance companies, HMOs, company health plans, and certain government programs that pay for health care, such as Medicare and Medicaid. Most Health Care Providers , especially those that conduct certain business electronically, such as electronic health insurance billing. Such providers include most doctors, clinics, hospitals, psychologists, chiropractors, nursing homes, pharmacies, and dentists. Health Care Clearinghouses and businesses that process nonstandard health information they receive from another entity or vice versa. Business Associates , by virtue of their relationship with covered entities.

Client medical records that are inputted by doctors, nurses, and other healthcare providers. Patient conversations with doctors about care or treatment with nurses and others. Client information that's entered into a health insurer’s computer system. Billing information about the client and clinic. Other client health information held by professionals who are required to follow HIPAA laws.

Healthcare businesses must have the proper measures in place to protect health information and ensure that it is not used or disclosed improperly. Facilities must have procedures in place to restrict who can view and access client health information and implement training programs for employees on how to protect medical information. Entities must have the appropriate safeguards to protect health information and ensure they do not use or improperly release this data.
ground_truth: Vagaro displays the HIPAA Seal of Compliance at the bottom of its Sales and Support web pages.

question: How can I reuse a product detail template across multiple products in Vagaro?
context:
[Article: Add and Manage Product Details | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/29371852223643-Add-and-Manage-Product-Details]
Additional Details allow you to add collapsible information to a product's listing page, like a t-shirt's sizing chart, a lotion's ingredient list, or a product's warranty. While a description explains what a product is used for and its benefits, Additional Details allow customers to learn more about your product. These details are closed by default, allowing you to add detailed information without taking up too much space.

To help save time and maintain consistency across your products, you can create reusable templates that add the same Additional Detail across multiple products. Updating a template will apply to all products to which it has been added.

Prerequisites: This feature is available for all Vagaro businesses, and you must already have products set up in your inventory .

Create a new product detail from Inventory Management . Any new details you create can be added specifically for this product or saved as a reusable template for use with other products.

On a Phone To add a detail: Select More → Settings → Management . Select the product to go to its Product Details , then in the top-right corner, select Action → Edit . You can also create a new product instead. Next to Additional Details , select Add Detail → Create Detail → Create New Detail . If you've already added a detail to this product, select Right-Arrow > → Add Detail → Create New Detail instead. Enter the Detail Title and Description . Tip Your Description is the content that is shown to your customers on the product's listing Page. You can format your text with bold, italics, underlining, lists, links, tables, and more. You can also improve your description by selecting the AI icon. Optionally, to reuse this detail with other products , turn on Save New Detail Template , then enter a Template Name . Select Add Detail . This detail will appear in Additional Details . Repeat these steps to add more details. Optionally, to change or remove a detail, select it, then select Edit or Delete . Note Editing a template turns off reuse and will not update this detail in other products. To sync changes across multiple products, edit the template from Product Detail Templates . If you added multiple details and want to change the order, select Move and drop it to a new position. Select Done → Save to update the product.

On a Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro To add a detail: Go to Inventory Management : Computer : Select Settings → Inventory . Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro : Select Inventory . In the top-right corner, select Action → Edit to edit it. You can also create a new product instead. Under Additional Details , select Add Detail . If you've previously created a template, a list of templates will appear. Select Create New Details in the list. In the Add Detail popup, enter the Detail Title and Description . Tip Your Description is the content that is shown to your customers on the product's listing Page. You can format your text with bold, italics, underlining, lists, links, tables, and more. You can also improve your description by selecting the AI icon. Optionally, to reuse this detail with other products , turn on Save as a Detail Template , then enter a Template Name . Select Add Detail . Repeat these steps to add more details. Optionally, to change or remove a detail, select it, then select Edit or Delete . Important Editing a template turns off reuse and will not update this detail in other products. To sync changes across multiple products, edit the template from Product Detail Templates . If you added multiple details and want to change the order, select Move and drop it to a new position. Select Save .
ground_truth: To reuse a product detail template across multiple products, turn on 'Save as a Detail Template' when creating or editing a detail, enter a Template Name, and save it. Then, when adding details to other products, select the existing template from the list to apply the same details.

question: What is the first step to creating a Vagaro business account according to the guide?
context:
[Article: Create Your Vagaro Business Account | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/44263218471323-Create-Your-Vagaro-Business-Account]
Setting up your Vagaro business account is the first step toward managing your services, customers, and day-to-day operations in one place. Whether you are launching a new business or switching from another platform, the sign-up process is simple and built to help you get up and running fast. This guide walks you through each step to create your account, customize your profile, and start booking with confidence.

Vagaro offers competitive pricing tailored to each country. Plans scale based on how many employees you have and the number of bookable calendars you want for your business.

Country Base Price Additional Employee Calendar United States $23.99 per month Only for a limited time One calendar license is included in your base subscription. Each additional employee calendar is $10 per month for up to seven licenses. After paying for seven licenses, you can add new employees to your account at no additional charge. Canada $35 per month One calendar license is included in your base subscription. Each additional employee calendar is $15 per month for up to seven licenses. After paying for seven licenses, you can add new employees to your account at no additional charge. United Kingdom £20 per month One calendar license is included in your base subscription. Each additional employee calendar is £10 per month for up to seven licenses. After paying for seven licenses, you can add new employees to your account at no additional charge. Australia $45 per month One calendar license is included in your base subscription. Each additional employee calendar is $15 per month for up to seven licenses. After paying for seven licenses, you can add new employees to your account at no additional charge.

Premium features are available as add-ons for an additional monthly cost.

This guide covers how to create your Vagaro Business Account. If you are a customer of a Vagaro business, please follow the steps in this article. To sign up:

On a phone or tablet, we recommend downloading the Vagaro Pro app and signing up from there. On the computer, go to the Vagaro Pricing page .

If you already created a Vagaro business account, see Log in to Vagaro .

After entering your information, you'll have the option to list the services you offer, including for business types like beauty, wellness, fitness, and more. The options you select will help us prepopulate your service menu in Vagaro. Your service menu is shown to customers on your booking page, allowing them to book. However, it also sets your Business Type in Vagaro. Your Business Type determines which searches your business appears in.

After choosing your services, enter your credit card information to continue. A temporary validation charge will be applied to your card, and the amount will be refunded immediately. It’s simply a verification step to confirm your payment method before your account is created. You won't be charged for your subscription until after your trial is over.

After entering your credit card information, you'll have the option to sign up for Vagaro Credit Card Processing.

Vagaro Credit Card Processing makes it easy to accept payments in a way that fits how you run your business. Whether you’re checking out in person, online, or on the go, payments are processed securely and flow straight into your Vagaro reports, so there’s no juggling systems or second-guessing numbers. Tips, refunds, and deposits are all handled in one place, giving you a clear picture of your revenue without extra spreadsheets or manual work. It’s designed to keep checkout smooth for your customers and bookkeeping simpler for you, because getting paid should feel effortless, not like another task on your to-do list.

If you choose the Free Contactless Credit Card Reader option, you’ll be able to order your Vagaro hardware right away. Your one-time discount applies to any payment device, including the Vagaro Credit Card Reader and PayPro Mini. You’re free to order additional hardware if you need it, and there’s no pressure to use the discount immediately since it stays available for a future purchase.

After claiming your hardware, you’ll be prompted to sign up for Vagaro Credit Card Processing and link your bank account so deposits can be sent to you. To learn more about requirements and the signup process, see Accept Credit Cards .
ground_truth: The first step is entering your information, which includes selecting the services you offer and providing your credit card details for verification.

question: How can I customize the display that my clients see on the device used for payments and forms?
context:
[Article: Manage PayPro Mini Settings | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/28540233231259-Manage-PayPro-Mini-Settings]
PayPro Mini provides a customer-facing screen for customers to provide card payments , signatures , and fill forms . This screen can be customized to choose the display appearance, add your business logo , as well as select images of your business and your Daily Deals . Note For customers in Canada, the UK, and Australia, PayPro is incompatible with the WisePad 3 credit card reader. You will need the WisePOS E instead, which is available from the Vagaro Online Store . Prerequisites : This feature is available only in the US and requires PayPro Duo (both PayPro and PayPro Mini ), an active Internet connection, and Credit Card Processing . To manage PayPro Mini settings: Go to Settings → Premium Features → PayPro Mini . Select whether you want to view the system in Light Mode or Dark Mode . Select your Screen Saver images to display instead of the Vagaro Pro idle screen. To show your Daily Deals, select + Add Slide , then select Daily Deals . To show a slide show of images, select + Add Slide , then select Image . Repeat this step to add more images. Optionally, enter slide text to appear when the image is shown. Select whether an image is Shown or Hidden in the slide show by selecting the icon in the row of the image. Delete an image by selecting the X in the row of the image. Change the order of the images by dragging the image's handle up or down to its new position. You can upload your images, like your logo or other branded images, or choose a Daily Deal. You can also set the duration of each screen-saver image slide. Select whether to automatically Reboot at Midnight for better performance (recommended). Select Save .
ground_truth: You can personalize the appearance by choosing between Light or Dark Mode, adding your business logo, and selecting images of your business or Daily Deals to show on the screen.

question: How can I add a Scale element to my form in Vagaro?
context:
[Article: Add the Scale Form Element | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/24398222395035-Add-the-Scale-Form-Element]
Ask your customers and employees using the Scale element to provide a rating or measurement by asking a question or requesting up to 200 characters on a form or SOAP note. For example, you can ask them their age range, pain level, or satisfaction of your workplace. When filling out a form, your customers and employees will be able to rate the answer to your question by selecting a value within a range of numbers, indicating their level of agreement, or assigning a star rating. Numbers 1-5 Numbers 1-10 Text Stars Prerequisites : This feature is only available on a computer, tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro version on Vagaro. Before continuing, check out the Create a Form Template article to learn more about how to build forms. To add the Scale element to your form or SOAP module: Go to Forms . Go to your form or SOAP note: To create a form template , in the top-left corner, select Create New → Form . To create a SOAP note template , select Create New → SOAP Note . To edit an existing form , select Action → Edit . To duplicate a form , select Action → Duplicate . Under Form Elements , drag the Scale element into the form designer. The element's settings will appear on the right side of the screen. If you already have this element in the form designer, select it to make changes. Enter a Title for this element. Choose a Scale Type . Optionally, to make this element required, turn on Required Field . Publish your form: To save this form as a draft and publish it later, in the top-right corner, select Save as Draft . This form is saved in form management and can be published at a later time. To see a preview of your form and how it'll look for your customers, in the top-right corner, select Preview . You can select the Computer , Tablet , or Phone icon to see how your form will look on each device. To publish your form, go to Settings , then in the top-right corner, select Publish . Your form is saved in form management.
ground_truth: To add a Scale element, go to Forms, select your form or SOAP note, then drag the Scale element into the form designer from Form Elements.
