[Article: Cancel Classes and Workshops from the Business Calendar | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/360009811873-Cancel-Classes-and-Workshops-from-the-Business-Calendar]
If any customers prepaid for the class or workshop, you'll have the option to refund them.

Keep the following in mind when refunding attendees:

If a customer purchased their class session as part of a package, you can only refund the visit. Class sessions paid for with a membership can only be refunded with cash or a gift card. Credit card refunds may take three to five business days to post to the customer's bank statement. You can't undo a refund once processed. You can't refund credit/debit transactions 120 days (four months) after the purchase date. You can't refund to a different card. You can't issue multiple refunds for the same item. For instance, if you issued a partial refund for a class session, you can't issue a full refund later. Vagaro currently can't refund Interac transactions.

On the Vagaro Pro App To refund a prepaid appointment: Find the class session, then change its status to Cancel . In the popup, select Refund . A list of customers who prepaid for their class will appear. Swipe left on the customer you want to refund, then select Refund . Configure your refund: Under the item to be refunded, select Refund . Enter the Refund Amount , then select Next . Enter how you would like to distribute the refund, like with cash or a gift card, then select Submit . Select Refund . Enter a reason and send a receipt: Enter a reason for the refund. Choose to send no receipt, Email Receipt , Print Receipt , or both. Select Continue . Depending on what you selected, the receipt will be sent to the customer's email address and/or you can print the receipt.

On a Computer To refund a prepaid appointment: Find the class session, then change its status to Cancel . In the popup, select Refund . A list of customers who prepaid for their class will appear. For the customer to be refunded, select the Action menu, then select Refund . Configure your refund: Select a box under the preferred refund option (i.e., cash, credit, or gift card). Enter the Refund Amount , then select Next . Enter how you would like to distribute the refund, like with cash or a gift card, then select Submit . Enter a reason for the refund and send a receipt: Enter a Reason for Refund . Choose to send no receipt, Email Receipt , Print Receipt , or both. Select Refund . Depending on what you selected, the receipt will be sent to the customer's email address and/or you can print the receipt.

If you accidentally add a class to your calendar, we recommend deleting it instead of cancelling it. If you only need to remove a single session from a workshop, we also recommend deleting that session.

On the Vagaro Pro App To delete a class: Go to the Calendar screen, then select the calendar you want to view . Find the class session. Select the class session on the calendar to open its details, then select Change Status → Delete . Complete the optional steps, if applicable. If there are no additional steps, continue to delete the class session. If the class is part of a repeating series, a popup will appear. From there, you can choose to Delete This Occurrence or Delete Series . If any attendees have prepaid or put down a deposit for the class session, choose whether to refund them. If you do, see Refund Class Sessions . Select Delete to confirm.

On a Computer To delete a class: Go to the Calendar screen, then select the calendar you want to view . Find the class session. Select the class session on the calendar to open its details, then select Change Status → Delete . Complete the optional steps, if applicable. If there are no additional steps, continue to delete the class session. If the class is part of a repeating series, a popup will appear. From there, you can choose to Delete only this occurrence or Delete the series . If any attendees have prepaid or put down a deposit for the class session, choose whether to refund them. If you do, see Refund Class Sessions . Select Delete to confirm.

[Article: Assign a Color to a Service | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/204347970-Assign-a-Color-to-a-Service]
When you assign a color to a service, you're actually assigning a color to its service category . Selecting a color for a service category will also apply to all its services, so you can visually identify what type of service is scheduled on the Calendar. Prerequisites: This feature is available for all Vagaro businesses . On a Phone To assign a color to a service category: Select More → Settings → Service/Class Menu . Select Services . Select the service category, and then select Edit . In the Category screen, select a Color . Optionally, you can change the Category Name as well. Select Save . A circle with your chosen color is shown next to the service category's name. On a Computer, Tablet, Pay Desk, or PayPro To assign a color to a service category: Select Settings → Service/Class Menu . Your service menu will be shown by default. Select the service category's Action menu, then select Edit . In the Insert Category popup, select a color. Optionally, update the category name as well. Select Save . A circle with your chosen color is shown next to the service category's name.

context:
[Article: Reschedule a Class Session | URL: https://support.vagaro.com/hc/en-us/articles/29913752844955-Reschedule-a-Class-Session]
Need to make a change? Class sessions can be rescheduled or reassigned to another instructor directly from the Calendar. Once updated, registered attendees will receive a push notification, email, and/or text message letting them know about the new class details. When you reschedule a class session, it is unlinked from any recurring class sessions or workshops. Any changes made after rescheduling will apply only to that class and will not affect the others. Prerequisites : This feature requires a scheduled class on the calendar. Drag and Drop a Class Session to Move You can reschedule a class session by dragging and dropping it to another timeslot or day. On the Vagaro Pro App To move a class session: Go to the Calendar screen, then select the calendar you want to view . Find the class session. Long press the class session you want to reschedule, then drop it to another timeslot. Tip Switch to the week or month view to reschedule this class for a different day. Optionally, if the class has attendees, choose whether to Notify Attendee or Don't Notify Attendee . The class session has been moved. Any registered attendees will be rescheduled as well. On a Computer To move a class session: Go to the Calendar screen, then select the calendar you want to view . Find the class session. Click and hold the class session to be rescheduled, then drop it to another timeslot. Tip Switch to the week or month view to reschedule this class for a different day. Optionally, if the class has attendees, choose whether to Notify Attendee or Don't Notify Attendee . The class session has been moved. Any registered attendees will be rescheduled as well. Edit a Class to Reschedule You can edit a class session on the calendar to change its date, time, and instructor. On the Vagaro Pro App To reschedule a class for another day: Go to the Calendar screen, then select the calendar you want to view . Find the class session. Select the class session on the calendar to open its details, then select Edit . Optionally, if the class repeats or is part of a workshop, a popup will appear. From there, select Edit This Occurrence . Select Date to change your class's date and time. Optionally, select Instructor to change who's running the class. Optionally, turn off Notify Attendee? if you don't want to let the attendees know of the change. Select Save . On a Computer To reschedule a class for another day: Go to the Calendar screen, then select the calendar you want to view . Find the class session. Select the class session on the calendar to open its details, then select Edit . Optionally, if the class repeats or is part of a workshop, a popup will appear. From there, select Edit only this occurrence . Change the Date , Time , or Instructor of the class session. Optionally, turn off Notify Attendee? if you don't want to let the attendees know of the change. Select Save .
